RuleName.description: The name of the sampling rule. Specify a rule by either name or ARN, but not both.

RuleARN.description: The ARN of the sampling rule. Specify a rule by either name or ARN, but not both.

ResourceARN.description: Matches the ARN of the Amazon Web Services resource on which the service runs.

FixedRate.description: The percentage of matching requests to instrument, after the reservoir is exhausted.

ReservoirSize.description: A fixed number of matching requests to instrument per second, prior to applying the fixed rate. The reservoir is not used directly by services, but applies to all services using the rule collectively.

ServiceName.description: Matches the name that the service uses to identify itself in segments.

ServiceType.description: Matches the origin that the service uses to identify its type in segments.

Host.description: Matches the hostname from a request URL.

HTTPMethod.description: Matches the HTTP method of a request.

URLPath.description: Matches the path from a request URL.

Version.description: The version of the sampling rule format (1).

SamplingRateBoost.description: Specifies the multiplier applied to the base sampling rate. This boost allows you to temporarily increase sampling without changing the rule's configuration.

MaxRate.description: Defines max temporary sampling rate to apply when a boost is triggered. Calculated boost rate by X-Ray will be less than or equal to this max rate.

CooldownWindowMinutes.description: Sets the time window (in minutes) in which only one sampling rate boost can be triggered. After a boost occurs, no further boosts are allowed until the next window.

KeyId.description: The ID of the KMS key used for encryption, if applicable.

Status.description: The encryption status. While the status is UPDATING, X-Ray may encrypt data with a combination of the new and old settings.

Type.description: The type of encryption. Set to KMS for encryption with KMS keys. Set to NONE for default encryption.

Group.description: The group that was requested. Contains the name of the group, the ARN of the group, the filter expression, and the insight configuration assigned to the group.

GroupName.description: The unique case-sensitive name of the group.

GroupARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the group generated based on the GroupName.

FilterExpression.description: The filter expression defining the parameters to include traces.

InsightsConfiguration.description:
The structure containing configurations related to insights.

  • The InsightsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights for the group or false to disable insights for the group.

  • The NotificationsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights notifications through Amazon EventBridge for the group.

InsightsEnabled.description: Set the InsightsEnabled value to true to enable insights or false to disable insights.

NotificationsEnabled.description: Set the NotificationsEnabled value to true to enable insights notifications. Notifications can only be enabled on a group with InsightsEnabled set to true.

GroupName.description: The unique case-sensitive name of the group.

GroupARN.description: The ARN of the group generated based on the GroupName.

FilterExpression.description: The filter expression defining the parameters to include traces.

The structure containing configurations related to insights.

  • The InsightsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights for the group or false to disable insights for the group.

  • The NotificationsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights notifications. Notifications can only be enabled on a group with InsightsEnabled set to true.

InsightsEnabled.description: Set the InsightsEnabled value to true to enable insights or false to disable insights.

NotificationsEnabled.description: Set the NotificationsEnabled value to true to enable insights notifications. Notifications can only be enabled on a group with InsightsEnabled set to true.

NextToken.description: Specify the pagination token returned by a previous request to retrieve the next page of indexes.

Name.description: The name of the indexing rule.

ModifiedAt.description: Displays when the rule was last modified, in Unix time seconds.

Probabilistic.description: Indexing rule configuration that is used to probabilistically sample traceIds.

DesiredSamplingPercentage.description: Configured sampling percentage of traceIds. Note that sampling can be subject to limits to ensure completeness of data.

RuleName.description: The name of the sampling rule. Specify a rule by either name or ARN, but not both.

RuleARN.description: The ARN of the sampling rule. Specify a rule by either name or ARN, but not both.

FixedRate.description: The percentage of matching requests to instrument, after the reservoir is exhausted.

ReservoirSize.description: A fixed number of matching requests to instrument per second, prior to applying the fixed rate. The reservoir is not used directly by services, but applies to all services using the rule collectively.

ServiceType.description: Matches the origin that the service uses to identify its type in segments.

URLPath.description: Matches the path from a request URL.

Version.description: The version of the sampling rule format (1).

SamplingRateBoost.description: Specifies the multiplier applied to the base sampling rate. This boost allows you to temporarily increase sampling without changing the rule's configuration.

MaxRate.description: Defines max temporary sampling rate to apply when a boost is triggered. Calculated boost rate by X-Ray will be less than or equal to this max rate.

CooldownWindowMinutes.description: Sets the time window (in minutes) in which only one sampling rate boost can be triggered. After a boost occurs, no further boosts are allowed until the next window.

SamplingStatisticSummaries.description: Information about the number of requests instrumented for each sampling rule.

Timestamp.description: The start time of the reporting window.

RequestCount.description: The number of requests that matched the rule.

BorrowCount.description: The number of requests recorded with borrowed reservoir quota.

ResourcePolicies.description: The list of resource policies in the target Amazon Web Services account.

PolicyName.description: The name of the resource policy. Must be unique within a specific Amazon Web Services account.

PolicyDocument.description: The resource policy document, which can be up to 5kb in size.

PolicyRevisionId.description: Returns the current policy revision id for this policy name.

LastUpdatedTime.description: When the policy was last updated, in Unix time seconds.

Group.description: The group that was updated. Contains the name of the group that was updated, the ARN of the group that was updated, the updated filter expression, and the updated insight configuration assigned to the group.

GroupName.description: The unique case-sensitive name of the group.

GroupARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the group generated based on the GroupName.

FilterExpression.description: The filter expression defining the parameters to include traces.

The structure containing configurations related to insights.

  • The InsightsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights for the group or false to disable insights for the group.

  • The NotificationsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights notifications through Amazon EventBridge for the group.

InsightsEnabled.description: Set the InsightsEnabled value to true to enable insights or false to disable insights.

NotificationsEnabled.description: Set the NotificationsEnabled value to true to enable insights notifications. Notifications can only be enabled on a group with InsightsEnabled set to true.

Destination.description: The destination of the trace segments.

UnprocessedTraceIds.description: Trace IDs of requests that haven't been processed.

Id.description: The unique identifier for the request that generated the trace's segments and subsegments.

Duration.description: The length of time in seconds between the start time of the earliest segment that started and the end time of the last segment that completed.

LimitExceeded.description: LimitExceeded is set to true when the trace has exceeded the Trace document size limit. For more information about this limit and other X-Ray limits and quotas, see Amazon Web Services X-Ray endpoints and quotas.

Segments.description: Segment documents for the segments and subsegments that comprise the trace.

Group.description: The group that was created. Contains the name of the group that was created, the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the group that was generated based on the group name, the filter expression, and the insight configuration that was assigned to the group.

GroupName.description: The unique case-sensitive name of the group.

GroupARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the group generated based on the GroupName.

GroupARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the group that the insight belongs to.

GroupName.description: The name of the group that the insight belongs to.

Categories.description: The categories that label and describe the type of insight.

StartTime.description: The time, in Unix seconds, at which the insight began.

EndTime.description: The time, in Unix seconds, at which the insight ended.

ClientRequestImpactStatistics.description: The impact statistics of the client side service. This includes the number of requests to the client service and whether the requests were faults or okay.

FaultCount.description: The number of requests that have resulted in a fault,

TotalCount.description: The total number of requests to the service.

RootCauseServiceRequestImpactStatistics.description: The impact statistics of the root cause service. This includes the number of requests to the client service and whether the requests were faults or okay.

FaultCount.description: The number of requests that have resulted in a fault,

TotalCount.description: The total number of requests to the service.

TopAnomalousServices.description: The service within the insight that is most impacted by the incident.

InsightEvents.description: A detailed description of the event. This includes the time of the event, client and root cause impact statistics, and the top anomalous service at the time of the event.

NextToken.description: Use this token to retrieve the next page of insight events.

EventTime.description: The time, in Unix seconds, at which the event was recorded.

ClientRequestImpactStatistics.description: The impact statistics of the client side service. This includes the number of requests to the client service and whether the requests were faults or okay.

FaultCount.description: The number of requests that have resulted in a fault,

TotalCount.description: The total number of requests to the service.

RootCauseServiceRequestImpactStatistics.description: The impact statistics of the root cause service. This includes the number of requests to the client service and whether the requests were faults or okay.

FaultCount.description: The number of requests that have resulted in a fault,

TotalCount.description: The total number of requests to the service.

TopAnomalousServices.description: The service during the event that is most impacted by the incident.

ServiceGraphStartTime.description: The time, in Unix seconds, at which the service graph started.

ServiceGraphEndTime.description: The time, in Unix seconds, at which the service graph ended.

Services.description: The Amazon Web Services instrumented services related to the insight.

ReferenceId.description: Identifier for the service. Unique within the service map.

Type.description:
Identifier for the service. Unique within the service map.

  • Amazon Web Services Resource - The type of an Amazon Web Services resource. For example, AWS::EC2::Instance for an application running on Amazon EC2 or AWS::DynamoDB::Table for an Amazon DynamoDB table that the application used.

  • Amazon Web Services Service - The type of an Amazon Web Services service. For example, AWS::DynamoDB for downstream calls to Amazon DynamoDB that didn't target a specific table.

  • Amazon Web Services Service - The type of an Amazon Web Services service. For example, AWS::DynamoDB for downstream calls to Amazon DynamoDB that didn't target a specific table.

  • remote - A downstream service of indeterminate type.

Names.description: A list of names for the service, including the canonical name.

AccountId.description: Identifier of the Amazon Web Services account in which the service runs.

InsightSummaries.description: The summary of each insight within the group matching the provided filters. The summary contains the InsightID, start and end time, the root cause service, the root cause and client impact statistics, the top anomalous services, and the status of the insight.

GroupARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the group that the insight belongs to.

GroupName.description: The name of the group that the insight belongs to.

Categories.description: Categories The categories that label and describe the type of insight.

StartTime.description: The time, in Unix seconds, at which the insight began.

EndTime.description: The time, in Unix seconds, at which the insight ended.

ClientRequestImpactStatistics.description: The impact statistics of the client side service. This includes the number of requests to the client service and whether the requests were faults or okay.

FaultCount.description: The number of requests that have resulted in a fault,

TotalCount.description: The total number of requests to the service.

RootCauseServiceRequestImpactStatistics.description: The impact statistics of the root cause service. This includes the number of requests to the client service and whether the requests were faults or okay.

FaultCount.description: The number of requests that have resulted in a fault,

TotalCount.description: The total number of requests to the service.

TopAnomalousServices.description: The service within the insight that is most impacted by the incident.

LastUpdateTime.description: The time, in Unix seconds, that the insight was last updated.

NextToken.description: Specify the pagination token returned by a previous request to retrieve the next page of indexes.

Service.description: Information about an application that processed requests, users that made requests, or downstream services, resources, and applications that an application used.

ReferenceId.description: Identifier for the service. Unique within the service map.

Names.description: A list of names for the service, including the canonical name.

Root.description: Indicates that the service was the first service to process a request.

AccountId.description: Identifier of the Amazon Web Services account in which the service runs.

Type.description:
The type of service.

  • Amazon Web Services Resource - The type of an Amazon Web Services resource. For example, AWS::EC2::Instance for an application running on Amazon EC2 or AWS::DynamoDB::Table for an Amazon DynamoDB table that the application used.

  • Amazon Web Services Service - The type of an Amazon Web Services service. For example, AWS::DynamoDB for downstream calls to Amazon DynamoDB that didn't target a specific table.

  • client - Represents the clients that sent requests to a root service.

  • remote - A downstream service of indeterminate type.

StartTime.description: The start time of the first segment that the service generated.

EndTime.description: The end time of the last segment that the service generated.

OkCount.description: The number of requests that completed with a 2xx Success status code.

ErrorStatistics.description: Information about requests that failed with a 4xx Client Error status code.

ThrottleCount.description: The number of requests that failed with a 429 throttling status code.

OtherCount.description: The number of requests that failed with untracked 4xx Client Error status codes.

TotalCount.description: The total number of requests that failed with a 4xx Client Error status code.

FaultStatistics.description: Information about requests that failed with a 5xx Server Error status code.

OtherCount.description: The number of requests that failed with untracked 5xx Server Error status codes.

TotalCount.description: The total number of requests that failed with a 5xx Server Error status code.
The total number of completed requests.

TotalResponseTime.description: The aggregate response time of completed requests.

DurationHistogram.description: A histogram that maps the spread of service durations.

ResponseTimeHistogram.description: A histogram that maps the spread of service response times.

SamplingTargetDocuments.description: Updated rules that the service should use to sample requests.

LastRuleModification.description: The last time a user changed the sampling rule configuration. If the sampling rule configuration changed since the service last retrieved it, the service should call GetSamplingRules to get the latest version.

UnprocessedStatistics.description: Information about SamplingStatisticsDocument that X-Ray could not process.

UnprocessedBoostStatistics.description: Information about SamplingBoostStatisticsDocument that X-Ray could not process.

FixedRate.description: The percentage of matching requests to instrument, after the reservoir is exhausted.

ReservoirQuota.description: The number of requests per second that X-Ray allocated for this service.

Interval.description: The number of seconds for the service to wait before getting sampling targets again.

SamplingBoost.description: The sampling boost that X-Ray allocated for this service.

BoostRate.description: The calculated sampling boost rate for this service

StartTime.description: The start of the time frame for which the graph was generated.

EndTime.description: The end of the time frame for which the graph was generated.

Services.description: The services that have processed a traced request during the specified time frame.

ContainsOldGroupVersions.description: A flag indicating whether the group's filter expression has been consistent, or if the returned service graph may show traces from an older version of the group's filter expression.

ServiceForecastStatistics.description: The forecasted high and low fault count values.

FaultCountHigh.description: The upper limit of fault counts for a service.

FaultCountLow.description: The lower limit of fault counts for a service.

ResponseTimeHistogram.description: The response time histogram for the selected entities.

Services.description: The services that have processed one of the specified requests.

Root.description: Indicates that the service was the first service to process a request.

StartTime.description: The start time of the first segment that the service generated.

EndTime.description: The end time of the last segment that the service generated.

OkCount.description: The number of requests that completed with a 2xx Success status code.

ErrorStatistics.description: Information about requests that failed with a 4xx Client Error status code.

ThrottleCount.description: The number of requests that failed with a 429 throttling status code.

OtherCount.description: The number of requests that failed with untracked 4xx Client Error status codes.

TotalResponseTime.description: The aggregate response time of completed requests.

DurationHistogram.description: A histogram that maps the spread of service durations.

ResponseTimeHistogram.description: A histogram that maps the spread of service response times.

TraceSummaries.description: Trace IDs and annotations for traces that were found in the specified time frame.

ApproximateTime.description: The start time of this page of results.

TracesProcessedCount.description: The total number of traces processed, including traces that did not match the specified filter expression.

NextToken.description: If the requested time frame contained more than one page of results, you can use this token to retrieve the next page. The first page contains the most recent results, closest to the end of the time frame.

Id.description: The unique identifier for the request that generated the trace's segments and subsegments.

StartTime.description: The start time of a trace, based on the earliest trace segment start time.

Duration.description: The length of time in seconds between the start time of the earliest segment that started and the end time of the last segment that completed.

ResponseTime.description: The length of time in seconds between the start and end times of the root segment. If the service performs work asynchronously, the response time measures the time before the response is sent to the user, while the duration measures the amount of time before the last traced activity completes.

HasFault.description: The root segment document has a 500 series error.

HasError.description: The root segment document has a 400 series error.

HasThrottle.description: One or more of the segment documents has a 429 throttling error.

IsPartial.description: One or more of the segment documents is in progress.

Http.description: Information about the HTTP request served by the trace.

ServiceIds.description: Service IDs from the trace's segment documents.

ResourceARNs.description: A list of resource ARNs for any resource corresponding to the trace segments.

InstanceIds.description: A list of EC2 instance IDs for any instance corresponding to the trace segments.

AvailabilityZones.description: A list of Availability Zones for any zone corresponding to the trace segments.

FaultRootCauses.description: A collection of FaultRootCause structures corresponding to the trace segments.

ErrorRootCauses.description: A collection of ErrorRootCause structures corresponding to the trace segments.

ResponseTimeRootCauses.description: A collection of ResponseTimeRootCause structures corresponding to the trace segments.

MatchedEventTime.description: The matched time stamp of a defined event.

Traces.description: Full traces for the specified requests.

NextToken.description: Specify the pagination token returned by a previous request to retrieve the next page of indexes.

Id.description: The unique identifier for the span.

Duration.description: The length of time in seconds between the start time of the root span and the end time of the last span that completed.

Tags.description: A list of tags, as key and value pairs, that is associated with the specified X-Ray group or sampling rule.

NextToken.description: A pagination token. If multiple pages of results are returned, use the NextToken value returned with the current page of results to get the next page of results.

Key.description: A tag key, such as Stage or Name. A tag key cannot be empty. The key can be a maximum of 128 characters, and can contain only Unicode letters, numbers, or separators, or the following special characters: + - = . _ : /

Value.description: An optional tag value, such as Production or test-only. The value can be a maximum of 255 characters, and contain only Unicode letters, numbers, or separators, or the following special characters: + - = . _ : /

KeyId.description: The ID of the KMS key used for encryption, if applicable.

Status.description: The encryption status. While the status is UPDATING, X-Ray may encrypt data with a combination of the new and old settings.

Type.description: The type of encryption. Set to KMS for encryption with KMS keys. Set to NONE for default encryption.

ResourcePolicy.description: The resource policy document, as provided in the PutResourcePolicyRequest.

PolicyName.description: The name of the resource policy. Must be unique within a specific Amazon Web Services account.

PolicyDocument.description: The resource policy document, which can be up to 5kb in size.

PolicyRevisionId.description: Returns the current policy revision id for this policy name.

LastUpdatedTime.description: When the policy was last updated, in Unix time seconds.

ErrorCode.description: The error that caused processing to fail.

Name.description: The name of the indexing rule.

ModifiedAt.description: Displays when the rule was last modified, in Unix time seconds.

Probabilistic.description: Indexing rule configuration that is used to probabilistically sample traceIds.

DesiredSamplingPercentage.description: Configured sampling percentage of traceIds. Note that sampling can be subject to limits to ensure completeness of data.

RuleName.description: The name of the sampling rule. Specify a rule by either name or ARN, but not both.

RuleARN.description: The ARN of the sampling rule. Specify a rule by either name or ARN, but not both.

ResourceARN.description: Matches the ARN of the Amazon Web Services resource on which the service runs.

FixedRate.description: The percentage of matching requests to instrument, after the reservoir is exhausted.

ReservoirSize.description: A fixed number of matching requests to instrument per second, prior to applying the fixed rate. The reservoir is not used directly by services, but applies to all services using the rule collectively.

ServiceName.description: Matches the name that the service uses to identify itself in segments.

ServiceType.description: Matches the origin that the service uses to identify its type in segments.

Host.description: Matches the hostname from a request URL.

HTTPMethod.description: Matches the HTTP method of a request.

URLPath.description: Matches the path from a request URL.

Version.description: The version of the sampling rule format (1).

SamplingRateBoost.description: Specifies the multiplier applied to the base sampling rate. This boost allows you to temporarily increase sampling without changing the rule's configuration.

MaxRate.description: Defines max temporary sampling rate to apply when a boost is triggered. Calculated boost rate by X-Ray will be less than or equal to this max rate.

CooldownWindowMinutes.description: Sets the time window (in minutes) in which only one sampling rate boost can be triggered. After a boost occurs, no further boosts are allowed until the next window.
